title: 4-letter words sprint
description: Speed sprint on the most common 4-letter words
text: that with this have from they been more them what some when than time only know also will many like into back over make most well take year
tips: 4-letter words appear in every English sentence
Watch for 'th' bigrams — they should be one motion
Type ahead — read 1-2 words past your cursor

character_tips.anna: Reading ahead is the secret of fast typists. Train your eyes to scan forward.
character_tips.maxim: These words are the skeleton of any sentence. Drill them mercilessly.
